query:
SELECT id, title FROM courses WHERE title IN (
  'Christian Leadership',
  'The Fivefold Ministry',
  'Prayer and Intercession',
  'Church Administration',
  'Systematic Theology',
  'Old Testament Survey',
  'New Testament Survey',
  'Deliverance Ministry',
  'Understanding Prophecy',
  'Biblical Hermeneutics',
  'Evangelism and Discipleship'
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2KiCrCqNDFcXt7P.577d1a63eeb5 --database P2Dpw9MQsmxzdUQCfGjV6b --execute SELECT id, title FROM courses WHERE title IN (
  'Christian Leadership',
  'The Fivefold Ministry',
  'Prayer and Intercession',
  'Church Administration',
  'Systematic Theology',
  'Old Testament Survey',
  'New Testament Survey',
  'Deliverance Ministry',
  'Understanding Prophecy',
  'Biblical Hermeneutics',
  'Evangelism and Discipleship'
);
